steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The text has an independent clause (who served in...Congress) followed by a list of examples (Ralph Harold Metcalfe...Alton Waldon Jr.). A colon introduces a list or elaboration.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content: A colon separates an independent clause from a list it introduces. Choices B (semicolon) and C (period) violate this rule by splitting sentences incorrectly; D lacks punctuation entirely. That matches choice A — A is correct.
